raw.subject: Your Gulf Breeze page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Finished up your last tan appointments this past weekend, till you move. That must be a big change for your business.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new clients to find you.

I sketched a page idea that could help showcase your services, like a services menu and a work gallery. It could also make it easy for clients to book appointments.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/della-s-airbrush-spray-tan-gulf-breeze

Let's discuss how a simple website can help you stay connected with your clients. As a local business, I offer a flat fee for websites that get results. If you're interested, let's talk soon.
